name: slideshow-skill
title: Curatorial Slideshow Storybook
description: Generate a warm-editorial curatorial deck as editable HTML and a review-ready PDF from copy, local images, and provenance records.

description_i18n.en: Generate a warm-editorial curatorial deck as editable HTML and a review-ready PDF from copy, local images, and provenance records.
description_i18n.zh-CN: 根据文案、本地图片和溯源记录，生成可编辑 HTML 与可审阅 PDF 的暖色编辑风格策展演示文稿。

query.en: Build a curatorial storybook deck from the copy and image assets I paste, upload, or name. Use the bundled warm-editorial style unless I provide another direction.
query.zh-CN: 根据我粘贴、上传或指定路径的文案和图片制作策展故事书演示文稿；若没有新的风格要求，使用内置暖色编辑风格。

inputs.name: brief
inputs.label: Project brief or source paths
inputs.placeholder: Paste copy or list files and folders to use

inputs.name: styleDirection
inputs.label: Style direction
inputs.placeholder: Optional; the bundled warm-editorial style is the default
